arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -O0 -g3 -Wall  --specs=nosys.specs -T /home/soo/vhil_project/STM32F412Vx_FLASH.ld CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/Core/Src/main_node_b.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/Core/Src/hil.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/Core/Src/Rte_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/Core/Src/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/freertos/tasks.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/freertos/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/freertos/list.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/freertos/portable/GCC/ARM_CM4F/port.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/freertos/portable/MemMang/heap_4.c.o CMakeFiles/node_b_standby.dir/third_party/cmsis_f4/Source/Templates/gcc/startup_stm32f412cx.s.o -o node_b_standby  -lm
